title: micranthes calycina
intro: Micranthes calycina, also known as the small-flowered wintergreen or small-flowered saxifrage, is a flowering plant species in the saxifrage family. It is native to North America and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can help to ease respiratory issues and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Micranthes calycina is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically to skin conditions and wounds.
